title: Jito NCN (Node Consensus Network)
description: An NCN — Node Consensus Network — is a workload registered with the Jito Restaking program that consumes economic security from Jito Vaults and pays rewards to operators and stakers.

supportedTokens.description: Restaked SPL tokens accepted as security.

slashingProgram.description: Program responsible for slashing on misbehavior.
